title: The Pillars of a Trustworthy Human-Centred AI System
description: A visual representation of the core interdependent pillars that form the foundation of a trustworthy AI system, supporting human values and centered around the user.
relationships: All pillars are interconnected and mutually supportive. The collapse or weakening of any single pillar jeopardizes the entire structure of trust. They collectively support the overarching goal of a Human-Centred AI system.
